results.title: Waiting for 2026 Maruti Brezza facelift? Spy shots reveal BIG surprise! Check what's new
results.description: 2026 Maruti Brezza: Maruti Suzuki is testing the facelifted version of its popular sub-4 meter SUV, the Brezza. The updated model is expected to launch during the festive season.

results.title: Indices tumble amid uncertain geopolitics; breadth weak
results.description: Barring IT index, all the sectoral indices on the NSE were traded in red with with realty, consumer durables and auto shares leading the fall.

results.title: Appian secures majority stake in Omitiomire copper project
results.description: Appian Capital Advisory has secured a 95% controlling stake in Omico Copper, the company behind the Omitiomire copper project in Namibia, following a buyout executed on 14 May.

results.title: Confidence Futuristic Energetech consolidated net profit declines 2.36% in the March 2026 quarter
LIVE BLOG: 'Reject Fuel Price' Protests Gain Momentum as Transport is Paralysed in Nairobi
results.description: A series of events is unfolding in Nairobi and across the country as transport stakeholders make good their threat to paralyse transport in protest of soaring fuel prices.
